html:
Lakshay Tyagi

Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh | +91 8851274454
lakshaytyagi47@gmail.com | LinkedIn | GitHub

Professional Summary

Motivated Full Stack Developer and 3rd-year B.Tech student with hands-on experience in building scalable web applications. Proficient in the MERN stack (MongoDB, Express, React, Node.js) and Next.js. Experienced in integrating AI services, real-time communication protocols, and cloud-based databases. Passionate about writing clean, maintainable code and developing user-centric solutions that bridge the gap between frontend efficiency and backend performance.

Technical Skills

Languages: JavaScript (ES6+), Python, SQL, TypeScript
Frontend: React.js, Next.js (App Router), Tailwind CSS, Redux, Zustand
Backend: Node.js, Express.js, RESTful APIs, Socket.io
Databases & Tools: MongoDB, PostgreSQL (Prisma), Git/GitHub, Postman
AI & Cloud: Gemini AI API, Vapi AI, Clerk Auth, Cloudinary
Concepts: JWT Authentication, State Management, Responsive Design

Key Projects

AI Dental Assistant SaaS PlatformNext.js, TypeScript, Prisma, PostgreSQL
  • Engineered a full-stack SaaS application featuring an appointment booking system with a multi-step user flow.
  • Integrated Vapi AI for real-time voice interactions to automate patient inquiries and support.
  • Implemented secure authentication and user management using Clerk and subscription logic.
  • Automated administrative tasks with Resend for email confirmations and transactional invoices.
GenAI Job Preparation PlatformReact.js, Node.js, Express, Google Gemini API
  • Developed an AI-driven career tool that analyzes resumes against job descriptions to identify skill gaps.
  • Integrated Google Gemini AI to generate personalized interview questions and tailored roadmaps.
  • Utilized Puppeteer for dynamic PDF generation of ATS-optimized resumes and reports.
  • Managed secure file uploads via Multer and maintained data persistence with MongoDB Atlas.
Real-Time Chat ApplicationReact, Node.js, Socket.io, MongoDB
  • Built a high-concurrency messaging platform enabling real-time communication and online status tracking.
  • Secured user data using JWT-based authentication and protected API routes.
  • Optimized state management using Zustand and handled media storage via Cloudinary.
  • Designed a modern, responsive UI using Tailwind CSS and Daisy UI for cross-device compatibility.

Education

ABES Institute of Technology, Ghaziabad
Bachelor of Technology (B.Tech) - Computer Science
2022 – 2026 (Expected)

Additional Information

  • Quick learner with a strong grasp of REST API architecture and system design principles.
  • Active contributor to GitHub with a focus on full-stack AI integrations.
  • Effective collaborator in team environments with a goal-oriented mindset.
  • Seeking opportunities to contribute to fast-paced engineering teams in Noida/Ghaziabad or remotely.
